did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review of Line-field confocal optical coherence tomography (LC-OCT) for diagnosing melanocytic and non-melanocytic skin tumors. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results. It only mentions that future studies are in progress regarding the association of LC-OCT with artificial intelligence algorithms.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
